name: tv.tootie/tailscale-rmcp
title: Tailscale MCP
description: MCP server for Tailscale networks — list devices, view routes, inspect ACL/DNS/users, authorize devices, and remove devices with confirmation.

environmentVariables.name: TAILSCALE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Tailscale API key. Create one at https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys.

environmentVariables.name: TAILSCALE_TAILNET
environmentVariables.description: Tailnet to query. Use "-" for personal accounts or your org domain, e.g. example.com. Defaults to "-".

environmentVariables.name: TAILSCALE_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to enable delete_device. Even when set, callers must also pass confirm=true. Defaults to false.

environmentVariables.name: TAILSCALE_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Static bearer token for MCP HTTP endpoint authentication. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32.
